steps.title: Identify the subject phrase
steps.content: The blank completes the subject before has identified. The name identifies which lawyer and cycling advocate the sentence is discussing.

steps.title: Avoid appositive commas
steps.content: Choice A inserts an unnecessary comma before the verb. Choice B treats the name as removable extra information, and Choice D opens that appositive structure without closing it. Because the name is essential to the subject, no comma is needed. The answer is C.
